name: swarm-discussion
description: Exploratory multi-expert discussion for unsolved problems, on Codex: a root-thread orchestrator runs a stigmergic blackboard over ephemeral swarm-expert subagents.

interface.shortDescription: Run structured multi-expert debates in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Exploratory multi-expert discussion for unresolved decisions. A root-thread orchestrator spawns ephemeral expert personas, preserves a shared write-ahead log, tracks argument references and position shifts, then synthesizes traceable conclusions.
defaultPrompt: Use swarm-discussion to stress-test this decision.
Run a lightweight swarm discussion on this tradeoff.
Compare the strongest arguments for this architecture.
